text.title: Time Tracking — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `TimeReport` weekly output and the invoice draft consumed by billing tools.

list.item: `write_offs` — array of `{reason ∈ {SALES, ADMIN, LEARNING, UNBILLABLE-REWORK, BREAK}, hours}`
`untagged_remaining` — number — hours still untagged after reconciliation (target ≤ 0.5h)
`gaps_detected` — array of `{start, end, suspected_project}` for operator review
`invoice_drafts` — array per client `{project, lines: [{date, task, hours, rate, amount}]}`

antipattern.reason: Untagged hours invoice as zero. Operator silently loses money each week. Reconciliation must close untagged blocks.

antipattern.description: `write_offs[*].reason == "OTHER"` or string not in closed list.
antipattern.reason: Violates r4. Forces coercion to ADMIN.
Empty lines confuse clients. Drop them.
Even empty array required — its presence proves the gap detector ran.
Statistically improbable for sustainable solo work; surfaces as a `data_warning` for inspection (capture errors, missed write-offs).

list.item: Round per-day hours to nearest 0.25h (15-min increments).
Merge blocks < 5min into the prior block (interruptions, not real switches).
Anonymise client names in shareable summaries.

text.reference: JSON Schema the output validates against.
CSV format invoicing tools (FreshBooks, Wave) ingest.

list.item: All write-off reasons from closed list.
Per-project totals sum to billable_hours total.
